name: EquipmentShare.com Inc
summary: EquipmentShare.com Inc is a vertically integrated construction equipment rental and technology platform founded in 2014. It operates 352 full-service branches, 9 dealership sites, and 24 building materials retail stores across 45 U.S. states. Core offerings include equipment rentals, new and used equipment sales, parts and services, and the proprietary T3 cloud-based telematics platform. The T3 platform provides real-time fleet tracking, predictive maintenance, and jobsite management. The Company also operates the OWN Program, leasing equipment from third-party owners.

products.name: T3 Platform
products.description: OEM-agnostic cloud-based telematics platform providing real-time equipment tracking, predictive maintenance, remote access control, and jobsite management.

products.name: Equipment Rental
products.description: Rental of construction and aerial equipment from a fleet managed via the T3 platform across 352 branches in 45 states.

products.name: OWN Program
products.description: Capital-light fleet growth model where third-party owners purchase T3-enabled equipment leased back to EquipmentShare for rental to customers.

products.name: Telematics SaaS Subscriptions
products.description: Software-as-a-service subscriptions with embedded telematics hardware for fleet performance monitoring, maintenance management, and jobsite oversight.

products.name: New and Used Equipment Sales
products.description: Sale of new and used construction equipment to customers through branches and dealership sites.

products.name: Building Materials and Hardware Retail
products.description: Retail sales of building materials and hardware supplies through 24 store locations.

products.name: Parts, Supplies, and Services
products.description: Complementary equipment parts, supplies, maintenance services, and jobsite support offerings integrated with the T3 platform.

partnerships.description: Authorized dealer for JLG construction and aerial equipment, offering rentals, parts, and services.
Authorized dealer for Takeuchi construction equipment, offering rentals, parts, and services.
Authorized dealer for Skyjack aerial equipment, offering rentals, parts, and services.
Authorized dealer for Genie aerial equipment, offering rentals, parts, and services.
